description_long: This object is a modern hoverboard with a sleek, elongated deck that features a glossy black finish on its upper surface. The deck is slightly concave with rounded ends, providing a stable platform for the rider. Underneath, two robust, cylindrical wheels are mounted near each end, finished in a deep red color and partially recessed into the board for a streamlined look. The edge of the deck reveals a thin, contrasting layer, likely wood or composite, adding a subtle accent to the design. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a hard, smooth surface and no visible lighting, branding, or control interfaces. The hoverboard is designed for personal transportation in urban environments, offering a minimalist and functional aesthetic.
description: A sleek, glossy black hoverboard with a concave deck and two red wheels, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black deck and both red wheels clearly visible beneath.
description_view_1: End view displaying the narrow profile of the deck and the rounded edge, with only the closest wheel partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the full length of the deck and both wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite end view, mirroring view 1, with the narrow deck profile and rounded edge visible.
attribute_wheel_configuration: Two large, cylindrical wheels positioned near each end of the deck, parallel to each other and partially recessed; wheels are robust and finished in red.
attribute_footpad_design: The footpad area is the entire upper surface of the deck, which is flat and slightly concave with a glossy black finish; no visible grip patterns, sensors, or raised edges are present.
